title: Vanilla Bean
description: A tried and true classic! Made with whole Madagascar vanilla beans, it's the perfect scoop.

title: Milk Chocolate
description: Creamy, sweet-- the perfect nostalgic chocolate ice cream.

title: Mountain Huckleberry
description: We use real huckleberries (no syrups or extracts!) to make this deeeelicious, fruity concoction. This crowd-favorite goes fast, so stop in soon if you catch it on our board!

title: Maple Walnut
description: Perfectly delicious and nostalgic. Creamy maple ice cream, chock-full of toasty, maple, salty-sweet walnuts.

title: New York Cheesecake
description: The flavors of a classic cheesecake, made into a dreamy, scoopable dessert. Made with plenty of graham crumbs, cream cheese, and sweet notes of vanilla.

title: Orange Speckled Chocolate
description: Our favorite citrus/chocolate combo! Creamy orange ice cream and melt-in-your-mouth chocolate flakes make for one tasty treat.

title: Rum Raisin
description: Perfectly nostalgic and classic! With notes of caramel and rum, and riddled with plump rum-soaked raisins throughout.
